name: Abdelrahim Elhaj
title: Fullstack Developer
about: Ambitious Fullstack Developer student with a solid foundation in IT and practical experience in agile web development. Proficient in Java, Spring Boot, and modern frontend tools, with a strong interest in AI integration and scalable web applications.

projects.name: FBK Balkan Youth Portal
projects.desc: Spring Boot · Java · PostgreSQL · Tailwind CSS
details: Built a production-ready sports management and administration platform for youth operations.
Implemented REST APIs, Spring Security with role-based access control, and GDPR data handling.
Acted as both a Fullstack Developer and Scrum Master within an agile team.

projects.name: Refine Chrome Extension
details: Developed a browser extension (Manifest V3) for instant text refinement.
Integrated external AI APIs for processing and optimizing user-generated text.

projects.name: The Glow Salon
details: Built a complete booking system with an underlying relational database.
Developed REST endpoints for scheduling and managing appointments seamlessly.

interests.title: AI & Automation
